titles.en: THE BOOK OF INTELLECT AND IGNORANCE

ar: قَالَ بَعَثَ اللَّهُ مُحَمَّداً ص فَقَامَ بِأَمْرِ اللَّهِ حَتَّى مَضَى ص وَ كَانَ بِقِيَامِ أَمْرِ اللَّهِ مُحْتَسِباً مُصَدِّقاً

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Muhammad Bin Yahya Al-Ataar, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Abu Qatadat Al-Qummy, from Salmat Bin Al-Kattaab, from Ali Bin Hassan, said: 'Allah sent Muhammad and he stood with the Command of Allah until he passed away, and he was, with the standing with the Command of Allah, reckoning and ratifying.'

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضَعِيفٌ - Mir'at al 'Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/11)

ar: عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص إِذَا رَأَيْتُمُ الْمُؤْمِنَ صَمُوتاً وَقُوراً فَادْنُوا مِنْهُ فَإِنَّهُ يُلْقِي الْحِكْمَةَ

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-Nowfaly, from Al-Sakuny, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah: 'Rasool-Allah said: 'Whenever you see the Believer to be silent and solemn, so go near him, for he would be casting the wisdom'.

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حَسَنٌ - Mir'at al 'Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/15)
